subcodes.first_line: The verses have been sent down, the clear proofs have appeared, the appointed time hath come to pass, and the All-Merciful hath come with His power and dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات و ظهر البینات و قضی المیقات و اتی الرحمن بقدره و سلطان چه
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
